title: Garlicky Crispy American Chicken Stir-fry
description: A nostalgic, garlicky stir-fry featuring crispy chicken and a tangy sauce, perfect for a quick Whole30-friendly meal.
instructions: In a wok or large skillet, heat 1 tbsp oil over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Add the chicken cubes and sear until golden and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes, reaching 165°F (74°C). Remove chicken and set aside.
Add the remaining oil to the pan, then toss in minced garlic, sautéing until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add the diced bell pepper, sliced carrots, and broccoli florets; stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until veggies are crisp-tender.

Return chicken to the pan, then stir in soy sauce, apple cider vinegar, tomato paste, smoked paprika, black pepper, and red pepper flakes; cook for another 2 minutes, letting the sauce thicken slightly.
Drizzle with sesame oil, stir quickly, and check seasoning, adding more salt or pepper if needed.
Garnish with chopped cilantro if desired, then serve immediately over a bed of cauliflower rice or enjoyed on its own.
Enjoy the garlicky, crispy flavor that brings back classic American comfort food in a Whole30-friendly format.
